description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the Serverless.gitlab-ci.yml template. Define a build job that extends the .serverless:build:image job from the template, and a deploy job that extends the .serverless:deploy:image job. Both jobs inherit the Docker image, scripts, caches, artifacts, and stage definitions provided by the template (typically a build stage followed by a deploy stage). No additional scripts, variables, or rules are added beyond those in the included template.
